# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  ARTIFACT_EXPIRY: "30 days"

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building binaries and configs"
    - mkdir -p artifacts
    - echo "binary content" > artifacts/myapp
    - echo "config content" > artifacts/config.yaml
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - artifacts/
    expire_in: $ARTIFACT_EXPIRY
    reports:
      junit: reports/unit.xml

deploy_job_1:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging environment"
    - ls -la
    - ./artifacts/myapp
  dependencies:
    - build_job
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com

deploy_job_2:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production environment"
    - ls -la
    - ./artifacts/myapp
  dependencies:
    - build_job
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://prod.example.com
  when: manual
